evaluation_task: coding-task-workflow artifact closure lifecycle and task graph storage
test_scenario: When should files.csv, sources.md, open-questions close? Where does Phase 7 task graph YAML live?

files_csv.closes_when: Immediately after file ledger is complete

sources_md.closes_when: Immediately after source ledger is complete

open_questions.closes_when: At end of Phase 5 when every entry is resolved or finalized as needs-human
open_questions.format: Structured table with id, question, status, resolved_by, answer

phase_7_task_graph_yaml.lives_in: phase:task-graph issue body (NOT a separate artifact subissue)
phase_7_task_graph_yaml.artifact_subissues: NO - task graph YAML is phase-owned
phase_7_task_graph_yaml.separate_artifacts: Separate task issues created per vertical slice (linked as sub-issues)
phase_7_task_graph_yaml.why_not_separate: Task graph is the primary Phase 7 deliverable; phase-owned content stays in issue body
phase_7_task_graph_yaml.closure: Phase 7 issue CLOSED after YAML authored and task issues created

artifact_hierarchy.task_graph_yaml: In body of phase:task-graph issue (NOT a subissue)

closure_rationale.files_csv: File discovery complete; no further exploration agents add files; reference for later phases
closure_rationale.sources_md: Research sources documented; no further updates; reference for decisions
closure_rationale.open_questions: All questions resolved or explicitly deferred; no blocking questions remain
closure_rationale.task_graph: Task decomposition complete; ready for Phase 8 implementation

gate_conditions.gate_a: Phase 3 exploration CLOSED + files.csv CLOSED + open-questions EXISTS (workflow.md:122)
gate_conditions.gate_b: Phase 4 research CLOSED + sources.md CLOSED + open-questions no status:open (workflow.md:148)
gate_conditions.gate_e: Phase 7 task-graph CLOSED + task issues created + dependencies recorded (workflow.md:222)

skill_specification_references: workflow.md:215 (task graph YAML authoring - Phase 7 Step 4)
artifact-schema.md (Phase Issue Requirements: task graph is phase-owned in issue body)
result_summary: The skill clearly specifies precise closure points for each artifact: files.csv closes at end of Phase 3 after file ledger complete; sources.md closes at end of Phase 4 after source ledger complete; open-questions remains open through Phases 3–4 and closes at end of Phase 5 when all questions are resolved/finalized; Phase 7 task graph YAML lives in the phase:task-graph issue body (not a separate artifact subissue) as the primary phase-owned deliverable.
key_insights: open-questions: OPEN Phase 3–4, CLOSED Phase 5 (questions resolved)
Task graph YAML: In phase:task-graph issue body, NOT separate artifact
Closure signals indicate work complete; open signals indicate ongoing
Task issues separate from task graph YAML: issues for implementation tracking, YAML for decomposition
